name: SinoTrade Compliance
description: China regulatory compliance consulting - GACC registration, Chinese label compliance, CCC certification, NMPA cosmetics filing, cross-border e-commerce, and trademark registration services.

skills.name: GACC Registration
skills.description: General Administration of Customs of China Decree 248/249 registration for overseas food manufacturers. Covers all 18 regulated product categories including dairy, meat, seafood, and health supplements.

skills.name: Chinese Label Compliance
skills.description: GB 7718-2025 compliant Chinese label review and design for imported prepackaged foods. Includes ingredient lists, nutrition facts, allergen declarations, and production-ready files.

skills.name: CCC Certification
skills.description: China Compulsory Certification for electronics, automotive parts, toys, and other regulated products. Covers testing, factory audit, and certificate issuance.

skills.name: NMPA Cosmetics Filing
skills.description: National Medical Products Administration cosmetics notification and registration for imported cosmetics. Covers ingredient safety assessment, efficacy evaluation, and filing submission.

skills.name: Cross-Border E-Commerce
skills.description: CBEC consulting for selling into China via platforms like Tmall Global and JD Worldwide. Covers PIPL compliance, customs clearance, and positive list navigation.

skills.name: Trademark Registration
skills.description: China trademark registration and brand protection. Covers trademark search, application filing, opposition monitoring, and Chinese brand name development.
